name: fork in the road
description: I'm in a fork in the road
hints: A fork in the road with three choices.
N leads to a large field. S leads to a ridge above a ravine.
The field has buried items. The ravine leads to the mine.
N=field (9), S=ridge/ravine (8), E=road back to town (6).
notes: Fork in the road hub. N=field (9), S=ridge (8), E=road to town (6).
